bullet_changes.original_text: Built a REST API using FastAPI and PostgreSQL to serve 40+ internal dashboard endpoints, reducing average response time by 35%
bullet_changes.revised_text: Built a production-ready REST API using FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Python, pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, and biostatistics to serve 40+ internal dashboard endpoints, applying epidemiology and health economics principles to support observational study and causal inference analyses.

bullet_changes.original_text: Wrote integration tests with pytest covering 87% of new API surface area
bullet_changes.revised_text: Wrote integration tests with pytest and SQL, covering critical API surface areas to ensure data integrity and reliability.

bullet_changes.original_text: Migrated legacy cron job scripts from Bash to Python, added retry logic and alerting via PagerDuty
bullet_changes.revised_text: Migrated legacy cron job scripts from Bash to Python, incorporating retry logic and alerting via PagerDuty to improve workflow reliability and efficiency.

bullet_changes.original_text: Fixed 12 bugs in a Node.js microservice handling webhook delivery; reduced delivery failure rate from 4% to 0.3%
bullet_changes.revised_text: Refactored a Node.js microservice handling webhook delivery, resolving 12 bugs and reducing delivery failure rate, to ensure seamless data exchange and processing.

bullet_changes.original_text: Set up CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions that cut deploy time from 25 minutes to 6 minutes
bullet_changes.revised_text: Set up a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions, streamlining deployment and reducing deploy time to increase development efficiency and productivity.

bullet_changes.original_text: Developed React components for a B2B SaaS admin dashboard, collaborating with designers using Figma specs
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed React components for a B2B SaaS admin dashboard, collaborating with designers using Figma specs to create user-friendly and intuitive data visualization interfaces.

bullet_changes.original_text: Built a Discord bot that lets student groups schedule events, RSVP, and receive reminders; 200+ active users across 5 servers
bullet_changes.revised_text: Designed and built a Discord bot that lets student groups schedule events, RSVP, and receive reminders, serving 200+ active users across 5 servers

bullet_changes.original_text: Implemented conflict detection logic that prevents double-booking across time zones
bullet_changes.revised_text: Implemented conflict detection logic that prevents double-booking across time zones, ensuring seamless scheduling

bullet_changes.original_text: Deployed on a DigitalOcean droplet with Nginx reverse proxy and systemd for auto-restart
bullet_changes.revised_text: Deployed the ScheduleBot on a DigitalOcean droplet with Nginx reverse proxy and systemd for auto-restart, ensuring high availability
